rounds.title: The Sandwich Standoff
rounds.description: A goose is eyeing a child's sandwich at the park. The tension is palpable. The child is unaware. The goose is not.

rounds.title: Shopping Cart Heist
rounds.description: An unattended shopping cart sits in a parking lot. A goose approaches with intent. This can only end one way.

rounds.title: The Picnic Raid
rounds.description: An unattended picnic blanket loaded with food. A goose sizes up the situation. This is a heist movie now.

options.label: 🛋️ Sit on the blanket like royalty

rounds.title: Golf Course Chaos
rounds.description: A goose has wandered onto the 18th green. A golf ball sits inches from the hole. The golfer watches in horror.

options.label: ⛳ Steal the golf ball and run

rounds.title: The Sandwich Standoff II
rounds.description: The goose is back. Another sandwich. Another victim. Will it play out the same way? Place your bets.

options.label: 🗣️ Honk so loud the sandwich explodes

rounds.title: Shopping Cart Heist: Part Deux
rounds.description: Same cart. Same goose. Different day. The parking lot is its kingdom now.

rounds.title: The Picnic Raid: Reloaded
rounds.description: Fool me once, shame on the goose. Fool me twice... still shame on the goose. Nobody learns.

options.label: 🐜 Start a turf war with ants

rounds.title: Golf Course Chaos: Back Nine
rounds.description: The golfer hired security. It didn't help. The goose plays by its own rules.

options.label: 🕳️ Claim the 18th hole as a nest
